headings.text: Upgrade Your Home Audio with the James Loudspeaker On Wall QT Series
Upgrade Your Home Audio with the James Loudspeaker On Wall QT Series

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingUpgrade Your Home Audio with the James Loudspeaker On Wall QT SeriesPosted on February 26, 2025Upgrade Your Home Audio with the James Loudspeaker On Wall QT SeriesIf you're looking for high-performance speakers that deliver crystal-clear, natural sound, James Loudspeaker’s new On Wall QT Series might be the perfect addition to your home.These sleek, wall-mounted speakers feature Quadratech (QT) tweeter technology, designed to provide rich detail and an immersive listening experience—whether you're enjoying music, movies, or TV shows.‍‍Unlike traditional speakers that can take up floor space, the On Wall QT Series blends into your home’s design with a range of sizes and over 15 color options to complement your decor. For outdoor and coastal homes, marine-grade models offer extra durability and weather resistance, ensuring long-lasting performance in any environment.‍‍The On Wall QT Series is designed to match the sound signature of James Loudspeaker’s VXQ Series and SPL Soundbars, making it a great choice if you're looking to upgrade or expand your home audio setup. With minimal DSP adjustments needed, these speakers provide a balanced, high-fidelity experience right out of the box.The speakers are now available, offering a stylish and powerful audio solution for any home.‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍‍‍‍‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
